statement: In every magma, Equation 569 (`x = y * (z * (y * (w * w)))`) implies Equation 3963 (`x * y = (y * (y * x)) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0372
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op y (op w w))))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op y (op y x)) z)
